name: claude-voice
description: Multilingual voice input for the Claude Desktop App and Claude Code Desktop (not the Code CLI). Hold a hotkey, speak any of 99 Whisper-supported languages, and the transcript pastes straight into the focused chat. Fills the gap while official voice mode is English-only. Lightweight plugin — no MCP, no TTS, just a venv + Python script. (Windows-tested; macOS/Linux feedback welcome.)
